title: Alpha Engine Research Intel (neutral product-facing intel, v1)
description: Neutral, product-facing research intel: written weekly by the crucible-research orchestration run to research_intel/{date}.json and research_intel/latest.json; a NEW sibling artifact to signals.json (config#1500, Phase 0 of EPIC config#1499). Carries ONLY the neutral derived OUTPUT of the research run (regime label + narrative, sector ratings/modifiers, market breadth, per-ticker attractiveness score + generic thesis). The tuned pillar/blend weights, prompts, and ENTER/EXIT position judgments stay PRIVATE in crucible-research and in signals.json — they MUST NOT appear here. Consumers (Metron Advisor, dashboards, external product surfaces) read this artifact for neutral intel without touching the edge-mixed signals.json. Evolution is ADDITIVE-ONLY per the S3 Contract Safety rule: new optional fields may appear at any time (additionalProperties stays true); removing/renaming a required field is a breaking change requiring a v2 schema + dual-write window.

date.description: Trading day the intel is FOR (YYYY-MM-DD)

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp / run-time of when the research run produced this artifact (provenance)

market_regime.description: 3-class Ang-Bekaert regime taxonomy label (from macro_economist_node). Legacy 4-class 'caution' retired; historical artifacts grandfathered on READ only, not valid against this write-contract.

regime_narrative.description: Macro narrative text for the regime call (from macro_economist_node report_md). Optional/nullable — the artifact remains valid when macro emits no narrative.

attractiveness.description: Per-ticker final composite attractiveness (0-100) + neutral score breakdown + generic thesis. Keyed by ticker.

rationale.description: Macro rationale for the sector rating

pct_above_50d_ma.description: Percent of tracked stocks above their 50-day moving average

pct_above_200d_ma.description: Percent of tracked stocks above their 200-day moving average

advance_decline_ratio.description: Advancers / decliners over the recent window

score.description: Final composite attractiveness score (0-100). null tolerated for unscoreable tickers.

breakdown.description: Neutral component-VALUE breakdown of the composite score. Carries the OUTPUT sub-scores only — never the tuned pillar/blend weights (those stay private in crucible-research).

thesis.description: Generic sector-team narrative (bull_case / sector). NOT a position or ENTER/EXIT judgment.

attractiveness_breakdown.description: Neutral score-component VALUES (no weights). All fields optional/nullable for graceful degrade.

bull_case.description: Generic bull-case narrative from the sector team
